---
title: "Jessie Mary Ann Palmer"
---

## Jessie Mary Ann Palmer

**Dates:** (Essex 1855-1929)

### Description

ladies\' maid to Gertrude Walter in 1891

### Biography

[census returns; birth and death registers]

Dr Chris Palmer, the Curator of Havant Museum, possesses some of CMY\'s novels inscribed to Jessie Palmer.

### Letters

- Letter from May 13th [1897]
- Letter from Decr 27th 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
